description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, rich wooden exterior and ornate carved details on its legs and lower front panel. The front view reveals a full keyboard with a standard arrangement of white and black keys, though the keys appear aged and slightly yellowed. The top section features three recessed wooden panels, adding to its classic, vintage aesthetic. The rear of the piano is unfinished, exposing the internal wooden bracing and structure, which is typical for upright pianos. The pedals are visible at the base, and the piano sits on sturdy, decorative feet. The overall appearance suggests a well-crafted, traditional instrument suitable for public or private urban spaces.
description: A vintage upright piano with a dark wooden finish, ornate legs, and a full keyboard. The keys are aged, and the rear exposes the internal wooden structure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the piano's depth, solid wooden panels, and ornate leg detail.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full keyboard, three recessed wooden panels, and visible pedals at the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, highlighting the piano's thickness and carved leg.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the unfinished wooden bracing and internal structure, with no keys or pedals visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, typical of a full-size piano; keys are slightly yellowed and aged.
